backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the 'Our Pharmaceutical Partners' section feature to its implementation in App.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing the purpose of each frontend source file including App.tsx, index.css, and tailwind.config.js.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for a default light/dark color theme without medical-specific customization.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Ghuge Medicals React app, mounting the root div and loading main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component for the Ghuge Medicals website, rendering the header, business info, contact details, pharmaceutical partners branded tiles, about section, and footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with OKLCH-based medical-themed color tokens featuring green and blue accents for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based medical color tokens, system font stack, custom border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks project state and metadata for the Ghuge Medicals single-page informational website, including architectural notes, color scheme, pharmaceutical partner logo requirements, and existing feature definitions.
